seoTitle: How to Buy TikTok Coins With PayPal (2026)
metaDescription: Learn how to recharge TikTok coins using PayPal through the web-based recharge portal to skip app store fees and support your favorite creators.
intro: Buying TikTok coins through the mobile app store often comes with extra platform fees, but the web-based recharge portal lets you pay with PayPal directly. This guide walks through finding bulk discount pricing and completing checkout with your PayPal wallet. It's useful for anyone who regularly gifts coins to creators during live streams.

steps.heading: Open TikTok's web recharge portal
steps.body: Navigate to TikTok's official web-based recharge page in your browser and log in to your account.

steps.heading: Review your balance and pricing
steps.body: Check your current in-app coin balance and browse the bulk discount tiers available through the web portal.

steps.heading: Select a coin quantity
steps.body: Choose your target coin package from the pricing grid.

steps.heading: Choose PayPal at checkout
steps.body: Click Recharge, select PayPal as your payment method, and continue to the secure PayPal login pop-up.

steps.heading: Authorize and verify
steps.body: Log in, pick your funding source, and confirm the payment to instantly add coins to your TikTok balance.

faq.question: Is the web recharge portal cheaper than buying in-app?
faq.answer: Yes, the web-based portal often offers bulk discount pricing not available through mobile app store purchases.

faq.question: Which PayPal funding sources can I use?
faq.answer: You can use your PayPal balance, a linked bank account, or a linked debit card during checkout.

faq.question: How fast do coins appear after payment?
faq.answer: Coins typically appear in your TikTok balance immediately after the payment redirects back and confirms success.

faq.question: Can I get a refund on purchased coins?
faq.answer: Refund policies for digital coins are generally limited, so review TikTok's terms before completing a large purchase.
